January.month_goal: This month we will practice heavier speed work for 5k/10k and hills specifcially for Boston! Stay on top of the little things and let me now if anything hurts or is too hard ASAP!! This will build our base for the next few months!

February.month_goal: This month we will work on hills a bit and continue to build speed! Stay on top of strength and recovery so we can have a big month before Tokyo!

March.month_goal: Let's keep building fitness! I'll avoid harder workouts in Japan so you can enjoy the vacation! If we can get in hard workouts great! If not then don't stress it!

April.month_goal: This month we will finalize feeling solid at race pace! Recover well post travel and focus on the little things as we execute these last few weeks!

May.month_goal: Let's rebuild gently and focus on some speed work until we start marathon training for Chicago! Let's take this time to get some more strength in as well!
